summary: Completed comprehensive testing of privacy controls and chat request features. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Privacy controls working correctly - club users cannot see player emails, admin users can. Chat request flow fully functional: club can request chat, player can accept/reject, admin can view all requests and create chat rooms. Fixed a bug where ClubPlayers.js was missing the useNavigate import.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (100%)
Backend: Player registration and approval (100%)
Backend: Club registration and approval (100%)
Backend: Privacy - Club cannot see player email in /api/players/{id} (100%)
Backend: Privacy - Admin CAN see player email in /api/players/{id} (100%)
Backend: Privacy - Player list for club has no emails (100%)
Backend: Chat request creation by club (100%)
Backend: Duplicate chat request prevention (100%)
Backend: Player can view incoming chat requests (100%)
Backend: Club can view outgoing chat requests (100%)
Backend: Admin can view all chat requests (100%)
Backend: Player can accept chat request (100%)
Backend: Player can reject chat request (100%)
Backend: Request status updates correctly (100%)
Backend: Notifications created for chat requests (100%)
Backend: Access control - Player cannot create chat request (100%)
Backend: Access control - Club cannot respond to request (100%)
Backend: Access control - Non-admin cannot view admin chat requests (100%)
Frontend: Player sidebar has 'Chat Requests' link (100%)
Frontend: Player Chat Requests page loads correctly (100%)
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Chat Requests' link (100%)
Frontend: Admin Chat Requests page shows all requests with status badges (100%)
Frontend: PlayerDetailView shows 'Request Interview Chat' button (100%)
Frontend: Request Interview Chat dialog opens correctly (100%)
Frontend: Chat request submission works with toast confirmation (100%)
Frontend: Club player list navigation fixed and working (100%)
seed_data_creation: Created test players, clubs for testing - all prefixed with TEST_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Privacy controls and chat request features are fully implemented and tested. The ClubPlayers.js file was fixed to add missing useNavigate import. All chat request flow endpoints working: POST /api/chat-requests, GET /api/chat-requests/my, PUT /api/chat-requests/{id}/respond, GET /api/admin/chat-requests. Test credentials: admin@soccermatch.com/admin123

bug_fixed_during_testing.issue: Missing useNavigate import from react-router-dom caused 'navigate is not defined' error when clicking player cards
bug_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added 'import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"' and 'const navigate = useNavigate()' in component
